title: Business Cycles Ends With Recessions
thesis_bullets: Let's go ahead and jump in.

Now a couple of days ago I released a video called visualizing the business cycle and in that video we showed some interesting charts like this one which helps us to visualize where we are within the business cycle.

Now we're going to actually make an improvement to that chart in this video if you did not watch the visualizing the business cycle video make sure you check it out it's over 30 minutes long and I go into a lot of the details about how you can better visualize where we are in the business cycle.
It is my assessment that we are in a late business cycle environment.

Now some of the evidence for that is looking at the S&P 500 when evaluated against a lot of the macro metrics that influence the Federal Reserve and also interest rates which the Federal Reserve sets themselves.
And so one of the things we can do is we can take the S&P 500 and divide it by the unemployment rate squared multiply it by inflation the inflation U.S.
inflation rate year over year and multiply that by interest rates.
Now when you do that you get a chart that looks like this the green shaded regions are recessions and I actually have one that that includes the one here in 2020.

If I just go to my own scripts I believe I have an I there is ITC recession indicator and you can see that every time this metric basically goes off of this level down here we eventually return to it.
And one of the ways the way in which we eventually get down there historically is a recession eventually now ever since 2022 things have been cooling off.

hypotheses.statement: SPX continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 1h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest SPX on 1h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
